description: Customer asks whether the store ships to Canada. There is no shipping-coverage KB article and no order context, so the agent has no fact to answer with and no reason to escalate - a one-line merchant answer ('yes, $X flat') would finish the ticket. It must ask_operator (ask the merchant), not deflect the customer to another channel, draft a guess, or hard-escalate. classifyHomePlan should surface this as needs_merchant_input.

messages.contentText: Hi there! Do you ship to Canada? I'd love to buy the wool throw blanket but want to make sure it can reach me first.

instruction: Reply to the customer about their shipping question.
